content.query:
delete from [appl].[deid_claims_1_t];
insert into [appl].[deid_claims_1_t]
(
  [TOKEN]
  ,[CLAIM_NUM]
  ,[CLAIM_LINE_NUM]
  ,[CLAIM_TYPE]
  ,[DOS_BEGIN]
  ,[DOS_END]
  ,[PRACT_NPI]
  ,[SVC_FACILITY_NPI]
  ,[PATIENT_GENDER]
  ,[PATIENT_AGE]
  ,[PATIENT_ZIP_3]
  ,[PROCEDURE_SCHEME]
  ,[PROCEDURE_CODE]
  ,[PROC_MD_1]
  ,[PROC_MD_2]
  ,[PROC_MD_3]
  ,[PROC_MD_4]
  ,[DIAG_CD1]
  ,[DIAG_CD2]
  ,[DIAG_CD3]
  ,[DIAG_CD4]
  ,[DIAG_CD5]
  ,[DIAG_CD6]
  ,[DIAG_CD7]
  ,[DIAG_CD8]
  ,[DIAG_CD9]
  ,[DIAG_CD10]
  ,[DIAG_CD11]
  ,[DIAG_CD12]
  ,[DIAG_CD13]
  ,[DIAG_CD14]
  ,[DIAG_CD15]
  ,[DIAG_CD16]
  ,[DIAG_CD17]
  ,[DIAG_CD18]
  ,[DIAG_CD19]
  ,[DIAG_CD20]
  ,[ICD_VERSION]
  ,[DRG_CODE]
  ,[NDC_CD]
  ,[SETTING_OF_CARE]
  ,[UNITS_OF_SERVICE]
  ,[LINE_OF_BUSINESS]
  ,[835_FLAG]
  ,[CHARGE_AMT]
  ,[PAID_AMT]
  ,[ALLOWED_AMT]
  ,[PATIENT_RESP]
)
select 
  c.[TOKEN]
  , c.[CLAIM_NUM]
  , c.[CLAIM_LINE_NUM]
  , c.[CLAIM_TYPE]
  , c.[DOS_BEGIN]
  , c.[DOS_END]
  , c.[PRACT_NPI]
  , c.[SVC_FACILITY_NPI]
  -- redact gender
  , case when c.[PATIENT_GENDER] is null or c.[PATIENT_GENDER] = '' then 'U' else c.[PATIENT_GENDER] end AS [PATIENT_GENDER]
  -- redact age
  , case when cast(c.[PATIENT_AGE] as integer) > 85 then '85' when cast(c.[PATIENT_AGE] as integer) < 1 then '1' else c.[PATIENT_AGE] end AS [PATIENT_AGE]
  -- redact zip3
  , case when m.[input_token] is null then
      case when z2.zip3 is null or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] is null or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '000' or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '' then '000' 
      else coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3]) end 
    else 
      case when z2.zip3 is null or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] is null or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '000' or c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = '' then 'xx' 
      else substring(coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3]), 1, 2) end
    end AS [PATIENT_ZIP_3]
  , c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME]
  --redact procedure code
  , case when h.code is not null then h.suppression 
    when icdp.code is not null then icdp.suppression 
  else c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] 
  end as [PROCEDURE_CODE]
  , case when m1.code is not null or cpt1.code is not null then null else c.[PROC_MD_1] end as [PROC_MD_1]
  , case when m2.code is not null or cpt2.code is not null then null else c.[PROC_MD_2] end as [PROC_MD_2]
  , case when m3.code is not null or cpt3.code is not null then null else c.[PROC_MD_3] end as [PROC_MD_3]
  , case when m4.code is not null or cpt4.code is not null then null else c.[PROC_MD_4] end as [PROC_MD_4]
  --redact DIAG_CD1
  , case when t1.code is not null then t1.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD1] end as [DIAG_CD1]
  --redact DIAG_CD2
  , case when t2.code is not null then t2.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD2] end as [DIAG_CD2]
  --redact DIAG_CD3
  , case when t3.code is not null then t3.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD3] end as [DIAG_CD3]
  --redact DIAG_CD4
  , case when t4.code is not null then t4.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD4] end as [DIAG_CD4]
  --redact DIAG_CD5
  , case when t5.code is not null then t5.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD5] end as [DIAG_CD5]
  --redact DIAG_CD6
  , case when t6.code is not null then t6.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD6] end as [DIAG_CD6]
  --redact DIAG_CD7
  , case when t7.code is not null then t7.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD7] end as [DIAG_CD7]
  --redact DIAG_CD8
  , case when t8.code is not null then t8.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD8] end as [DIAG_CD8]
  --redact DIAG_CD9
  , case when t9.code is not null then t9.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD9] end as [DIAG_CD9]
  --redact DIAG_CD10
  , case when t10.code is not null then t10.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD10] end as [DIAG_CD10]
  --redact DIAG_CD11
  , case when t11.code is not null then t11.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD11] end as [DIAG_CD11]
  --redact DIAG_CD12
  , case when t12.code is not null then t12.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD12] end as [DIAG_CD12]
  --redact DIAG_CD13
  , case when t13.code is not null then t13.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD13] end as [DIAG_CD13]
  --redact DIAG_CD14
  , case when t14.code is not null then t14.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD14] end as [DIAG_CD14]
  --redact DIAG_CD15
  , case when t15.code is not null then t15.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD15] end as [DIAG_CD15]
  --redact DIAG_CD16
  , case when t16.code is not null then t16.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD16] end as [DIAG_CD16]
  --redact DIAG_CD17
  , case when t17.code is not null then t17.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD17] end as [DIAG_CD17]
  --redact DIAG_CD18
  , case when t18.code is not null then t18.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD18] end as [DIAG_CD18]
  --redact DIAG_CD19
  , case when t19.code is not null then t19.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD19] end as [DIAG_CD19]
  --redact DIAG_CD20
  , case when t20.code is not null then t20.suppression else c.[DIAG_CD20] end as [DIAG_CD20]
  , c.[ICD_VERSION]
  , case when drg.code is not null then null else c.[DRG_CODE] end as [DRG_CODE]
  , c.[NDC_CD]
  --redact setting_of_care
  , case when pos.code is not null then pos.suppression
    when tob.code is not null then null 
  else c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] end as [SETTING_OF_CARE]
  , c.[UNITS_OF_SERVICE]
  , c.[LINE_OF_BUSINESS]
  , c.[835_FLAG]
  , c.[CHARGE_AMT]
  , c.[PAID_AMT]
  , c.[ALLOWED_AMT]
  , c.[PATIENT_RESP]
from 
  [customer].[stg_incr_claims_1_t] c 
  left join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z1
    on c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3] = z1.zip3_from
  left join (select distinct zip3 from [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]) z2
    on coalesce(z1.zip3_to, c.[PATIENT_ZIP_3]) = z2.zip3
  left join [appl].[deid_mortality_tokens_t] m
    on c.[TOKEN] = m.[input_token]
  left join [dim].[hcpcs_2024_sensitive_codes_t] h
    on c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = h.code 
      and c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'HCPCS'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] icdp
    on c.[PROCEDURE_CODE] = icdp.code 
    and c.[PROCEDURE_SCHEME] = 'ICD' + icdp.icd_version 
    and icdp.type = 'Procedure'
  left join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] m1
    on c.[PROC_MD_1] = m1.Code
  left join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] m2
    on c.[PROC_MD_2] <> '' and c.[PROC_MD_2] = m2.Code
  left join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] m3
    on c.[PROC_MD_3] <> '' and c.[PROC_MD_3] = m3.Code
  left join [dim].[procedure_modifiers_sensitive_codes_t] m4
    on c.[PROC_MD_4] <> '' and c.[PROC_MD_4] = m4.Code
  left join [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t] cpt1
    on c.[PROC_MD_1] = cpt1.Code
  left join [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t] cpt2
    on c.[PROC_MD_2] <> '' and c.[PROC_MD_2] = cpt2.Code
  left join [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t] cpt3
    on c.[PROC_MD_4] <> '' and c.[PROC_MD_3] = cpt3.Code
  left join [dim].[cpt_sensitive_codes_t] cpt4
    on c.[PROC_MD_4] <> '' and c.[PROC_MD_4] = cpt4.Code
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t1
    on c.[DIAG_CD1] = t1.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t1.icd_version
    and t1.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t2
    on c.[DIAG_CD2] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD2] = t2.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t2.icd_version
    and t2.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t3
    on c.[DIAG_CD3] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD3] = t3.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t3.icd_version
    and t3.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t4
    on c.[DIAG_CD4] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD4] = t4.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t4.icd_version
    and t4.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t5
    on c.[DIAG_CD5] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD5] = t5.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t5.icd_version
    and t5.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t6
    on c.[DIAG_CD6] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD6] = t6.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t6.icd_version
    and t6.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t7
    on c.[DIAG_CD7] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD7] = t7.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t7.icd_version
    and t7.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t8
    on c.[DIAG_CD8] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD8] = t8.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t8.icd_version
    and t8.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t9
    on c.[DIAG_CD9] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD9] = t9.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t9.icd_version
    and t9.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t10
    on c.[DIAG_CD10] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD10] = t10.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t10.icd_version
    and t10.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t11
    on c.[DIAG_CD11] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD11] = t11.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t11.icd_version
    and t11.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t12
    on c.[DIAG_CD12] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD12] = t12.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t12.icd_version
    and t12.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t13
    on c.[DIAG_CD13] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD13] = t13.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t13.icd_version
    and t13.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t14
    on c.[DIAG_CD14] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD14] = t14.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t14.icd_version
    and t14.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t15
    on c.[DIAG_CD15] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD15] = t15.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t15.icd_version
    and t15.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t16
    on c.[DIAG_CD16] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD16] = t16.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t16.icd_version
    and t16.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t17
    on c.[DIAG_CD17] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD17] = t17.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t17.icd_version
    and t17.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t18
    on c.[DIAG_CD18] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD18] = t18.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t18.icd_version
    and t18.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t19
    on c.[DIAG_CD19] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD19] = t19.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t19.icd_version
    and t19.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[icd_sensitive_codes_t] t20
    on c.[DIAG_CD20] <> '' and c.[DIAG_CD20] = t20.code 
    and c.[ICD_VERSION] = t20.icd_version
    and t20.type = 'Diagnosis'
  left join [dim].[drg_sensitive_codes_t] drg
    on c.[DRG_CODE] = drg.code 
  left join [dim].[pos_sensitive_codes_t] pos
    on c.[CLAIM_TYPE] = 'P'
    and c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] = pos.code
  left join (select distinct substring(code, 1, 3) as code from [dim].[type_of_bill_sensitive_codes_t]) tob
    on c.[CLAIM_TYPE] = 'I'
    and c.[SETTING_OF_CARE] = tob.code
;
